ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., forward, midfielder) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., available, injured) */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the player in the fantasy market */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the player (e.g., fit, injured) */,
  "suspension_status" TEXT /* Suspension status of the player (e.g., suspended, not suspended) */,
  "days_missed_due_to_injury" INTEGER /* Days missed by the player due to injury */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists provided by the player */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Total clean sheets by the player */,
  "penalties_saved" INTEGER /* Total penalties saved by the player */,
  "penalties_missed" INTEGER /* Total penalties missed by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "home_stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "home_stadium_address" TEXT /* Address of the home stadium */,
  "away_stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the away stadium */,
  "away_stadium_address" TEXT /* Address of the away stadium */,
  "transfer_budget" REAL /* Transfer budget of the team */,
  "team_value" REAL /* Current value of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the league season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the league season */,
  "total_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams in the league */,
  "total_rounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rounds in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fixtures" (
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fixture */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "kickoff_time" TEXT /* Kickoff time of the match */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number of the match */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., 2-1) */,
  "matchday" INTEGER /* Matchday (e.g., 1, 2, 3, etc.) */,
  "matchweek" INTEGER /* Matchweek (e.g., 1, 2, 3, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fixture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fixtures_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fixtures_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fixture */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "bonus" INTEGER /* Bonus points awarded to the player */,
  "bps" INTEGER /* Bonus points scored (bps) */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets by the player */,
  "creativity" REAL /* Creativity index of the player */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded by the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "ict_index" REAL /* ICT index of the player */,
  "influence" REAL /* Influence of the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "own_goals" INTEGER /* Number of own goals by the player */,
  "penalties_missed" INTEGER /* Number of penalties missed by the player */,
  "penalties_saved" INTEGER /* Number of penalties saved by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number of the match */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves made by the player */,
  "selected" INTEGER /* Number of times the player was selected by users */,
  "team_a_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "team_h_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "threat" INTEGER /* Threat index of the player */,
  "total_points" REAL /* Total points scored by the player in the match */,
  "transfers_balance" INTEGER /* Net transfers (in - out) of the player */,
  "transfers_in" INTEGER /* Number of transfers in of the player */,
  "transfers_out" INTEGER /* Number of transfers out of the player */,
  "value" REAL /* Current value of the player in the fantasy market */,
  "was_home" INTEGER /* Whether the player was playing at home */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "expected_assists" REAL /* Expected assists of the player */,
  "expected_goals" REAL /* Expected goals of the player */,
  "expected_goals_conceded" REAL /* Expected goals conceded by the player */,
  "expected_threat" REAL /* Expected threat of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_fixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("fixture_id") REFERENCES fixtures ("fixture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team is in */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "budget" REAL /* Current budget of the team */,
  "formation" TEXT /* Formation of the team (e.g., 4-4-2) */,
  "current_event" INTEGER /* Current event of the team (e.g., matchday, matchweek) */,
  "team_value" REAL /* Current value of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_players" (
  "team_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player in a user's team */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fantasy team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team (e.g., forward, midfielder) */,
  "transfer_price" REAL /* Price at which the player was transferred into the team */,
  "transfer_round" INTEGER /* Round number when the player was transferred into the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES user_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fantasy team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of transfer (e.g., in, out) */,
  "transfer_price" REAL /* Price at which the player was transferred */,
  "transfer_round" INTEGER /* Round number when the transfer occurred */,
  "transfer_time" TEXT /* Time when the transfer was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES user_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fixture */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the user's team */,
  "team_value" REAL /* Current value of the user's team */,
  "bank" REAL /* Current budget (bank) of the user */,
  "transfers_made" INTEGER /* Number of transfers made by the user */,
  "event_points" INTEGER /* Points scored in the current event */,
  "overall_rank" INTEGER /* Overall rank of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_performance_fixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("fixture_id") REFERENCES fixtures ("fixture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_performance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing record */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "total_goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "total_goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference of the team */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Current position of the team in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_standings_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_leagues" (
  "user_league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user league record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's team in the league */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_leagues_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_leagues_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES user_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_leagues_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fixture */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "kickoff_time" TEXT /* Kickoff time of the match */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., 2-1) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the match */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the match was played */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Referee of the match */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_fixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("fixture_id") REFERENCES fixtures ("fixture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., goal, assist, tackle) */,
  "event_time" INTEGER /* Time of the event in minutes */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the event on the pitch */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the event on the pitch */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Additional details of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots by the team */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the team */,
  "passes" INTEGER /* Number of passes by the team */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of completed passes by the team */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles by the team */,
  "tackles_won" INTEGER /* Number of tackles won by the team */,
  "dribbles" INTEGER /* Number of dribbles by the team */,
  "dribbles_completed" INTEGER /* Number of completed dribbles by the team */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the team */,
  "corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners won by the team */,
  "offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offside positions by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_match_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists provided by the player */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the player */,
  "passes" INTEGER /* Number of passes by the player */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of completed passes by the player */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles by the player */,
  "tackles_won" INTEGER /* Number of tackles won by the player */,
  "dribbles" INTEGER /* Number of dribbles by the player */,
  "dribbles_completed" INTEGER /* Number of completed dribbles by the player */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "squad" (
  "squad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each squad record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team (e.g., forward, midfielder) */,
  "shirt_number" INTEGER /* Shirt number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("squad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squad_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squad_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
